title: [codex] add gen docs social metadata
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds gen docs favicon, app icons, manifest metadata, and social preview assets.
- Adds docs/root SEO metadata and guide-page social tags.
- Serves generated icon/OG files from `gen.pollinations.ai/public`.
- Keeps `/manifest.webmanifest` and `/` Worker-owned with `run_worker_first`, so the Worker manifest route is the single manifest source.
- Updates the icon generator to keep gen maskable icons/OG assets without recreating a duplicate static manifest.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write ...`
- `npx vitest run test/index.test.ts test/docs.test.ts` from `gen.pollinations.ai` (`index.test.ts` passed; combined run hit a docs YAML timeout)
- `npx vitest run test/docs.test.ts` from `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run typecheck` from `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build:production` from `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run generate -- --app gen` from `tools/icons`

gist.headline: A fresh face for Gen Docs
gist.blurb: The Gen API documentation just got a visual upgrade with fresh favicons, social preview images, and SEO metadata. Sharing links to the docs now looks as good as the code inside them.
gist.summary: Added favicons, Open Graph images, and SEO metadata to the Gen API documentation, served directly from the Worker.
gist.impact: Links to the Gen docs will now unfurl with proper preview images on social media, and the site can be saved to home screens with crisp app icons.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot holding up a shiny new picture frame (representing an Open Graph image) next to a retro computer monitor displaying a social media post. The robot companion is looking at the frame excitedly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny beret, holding up a glowing lime green (#ecf874) picture frame. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head looks at the frame excitedly. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
